title: Review: core/src/*.rs round 13
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — Two findings, both in the same zeroization class as nie-kef6.103. No new protocol bugs, no auth bypasses, no correctness issues found. The rest of the codebase (auth, hpke, mls, pow, messages, protocol, transport) is clean relative to previous rounds.
Confidence: 85% chance no missed bug in scope. Uncertainty: hpke crate PrivateKey zeroization-on-drop not audited; openmls credential binding (nie-kef6.2) has additional surface; mine_token cancellation not tested. Would raise confidence with hpke crate source audit for PrivateKey drop behavior.
